CustomSql.Name: economy_events
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
SELECT
  events.payload.event.event_id::VARCHAR as event_id,
  events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR as event_type,
  date(timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second') as event_date,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.item_id::VARCHAR, '') as item_id,
  CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.currency_amount::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) as currency_amount,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.currency_amount::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 9 THEN '01: $1-9'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.currency_amount::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN '02: $10-19'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.currency_amount::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 20 AND 49 THEN '03: $20-49'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.currency_amount::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 50 AND 99 THEN '04: $50-99'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.currency_amount::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) >= 100 THEN '05: $100+'
    ELSE '99: Unknown'
  END as currency_amount_band,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.currency_type::VARCHAR, '') as currency_type,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.transaction_id::VARCHAR, '') as transaction_id,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.item_rarity::VARCHAR, '') as item_rarity,
  CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.lootbox_cost::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) as lootbox_cost,
  1 as event_count
FROM "<EVENTS_DATABASE>"."public"."event_data" events
WHERE events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR IN ('iap_transaction', 'lootbox_opened', 'item_viewed')
  AND timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second' >= dateadd(day, -30, getdate())
